R1: Product | Remaining | Note | Usage for 1 slide / 2 samples: (e.g. 20 ROIs / 36 AOIs) | Max slides | | estimates (per sample):
R2: Collection plate | 6 plates (576) + 75 wells | | 3/8 plate, 36 wells | 18.0 | | eyeMT: 30 ROIs, max 60 AOIs
R3: GeoMx Sequence code plate / Primer | 5 plates (480) + 75 wells | | | 16.0 | | TLS: 20 ROIs = AOIs
R4: Probe WTA - Whole Transcripomics atlas | 28 slides | at least 28, possible 30 | | 28.0
R5: Master Mix for PCR | 6 (576 rxns)+1 tubes | at least 18 | | 18.0 | | 30 slides, max 50 ROIs / 80 AOIs per sample, 100 ROIs / 160 AOIs per slide
R7: PanCK | 80.75 | 5.5 ul for 2 slides (1:80) | | 29.0 | | 4 slides for Anni, 12 ROIs
R8: CD45 | 61.5 | 5.5 ul for 1 slide (1:40) | | 11.0
R10: Buffer H | 6 bottles | 1 in machine / 1 remaining | | ~40
R11: Buffer S Big | 17 bottles | 1 in machine | | ~50
R12: Buffer S Small | 6+1 bottles | for RNA slide prep | | 32.0
R13: Buffer R | 3+1 bottles | for RNA slide prep | | 32.0
R14: Buffer W | 6+1 bottles | for RNA slide prep | | 32.0
R16: Beads | 21 slides | | | 21.0
R17: DEPC H2O | | around 1 bottle for 1 slide
R18: Proteinase K | | 2.5 ul for 2 slides in one washing tube | | 400.0
